insight: gstack browse resets between Bash calls. Chain all commands in one call.

When switching from local to external API (RAG_LLM_SOURCE=api), stored model_routing in system_config.json may contain stale local model names that dont match current local_llm_default, preventing auto-override logic from triggering. DashScope returns 404 for unknown models.

Docker rebuild with cache can serve stale pip layers. When pypdf (or any new dep) is added to requirements but the COPY requirements step is cached, the RUN pip install layer also uses cache and the new dep is missing. Container starts accepting connections but crashes on import. Symptoms: connection reset, not 500. Fix: rebuild --no-cache or bust the pip layer cache.

ChatResponse and ChatStreamMetaPayload currently include suggested_questions, but MAIN_CONTRACT_MATRIX.md and exact-key main contract tests still omit that field. Broad chat contract tests can fail even when a stream-marker fix is correct; decide whether to promote suggested_questions into the stable contract or exclude it from serialized contract payloads.

DocumentIngestionService can lose parser table blocks if SOPStructuredChunker returns chunks first. For standards or SOP-like PDFs with tables, preserve table chunks alongside structured summary/clause chunks instead of treating structured chunking as an exclusive path.
For this repo QA flow, gstack browse can reset to about:blank during longer streaming waits. Use a single short chained call or switch to Chrome DevTools for persistent interactive verification.

In the portal SPA, PerformanceNavigationTiming.type stays tied to the top-level document load. After a browser reload it remains reload across later React route remounts, so route-level restore logic must consume the reload signal only once per document instead of checking it on every mount.

User prefers admin-console redesign to follow a classic enterprise console pattern: dark fixed sidebar, light canvas, orange active accents, KPI-first overview, and not portal-style soft hero framing.

DashScope WebSearch MCP weather lookups in this repo are nondeterministic at the provider layer: identical Beijing weather prompts can alternate between 3 sources and empty sources, while official-doc queries stay stable. Do not assume an empty weather result means parser failure until you compare repeated raw responses.

In ChatService external fallback gating, citation.score can be post-rerank and higher than the retrieval pipeline’s final top1 score. Threshold decisions for supplemental/global fallback should prefer retrieval diagnostic final_top1_score over citation.score.
Wrapping workflow.advance should preserve executed ui_intent and terminal_state; flattening everything to review_execution/fix_preflight hides real runtime semantics and misleads host UI.

Host-side driveAgentWorkflow currently resolve-calls first, and service-side advance_workflow_capability resolves again. Direct execution prompts pay double routing/preflight cost unless advance can reuse prior resolution.

Chrome DevTools MCP localhost smoke does not inherit the user's regular browser login state in this repo. Portal auth restores from localStorage key enterprise_rag_auth_session_v1, so authenticated smoke must log in inside the controlled browser session or import cookies/session explicitly.
Passive runtime helpers that only bypass explicit entries will silently over-admit general prompts. Lock repo-code intent with a negative boundary test before calling the integration complete.
When extracting SOP preview/source helpers into a resolver, protect against duplicate document preview reads by returning one explicit evidence bundle and locking it with an integration test.

Passive runtime routing can still over-admit low-ambiguity single-file edit prompts when the host does not supply directEditTarget; keep a thin prompt-level direct-edit fallback and a regression test in the SDK gate.

When DocumentService.update_document_folder moves a root folder under a new parent, the root record must set parent_path to effective_target_parent_path directly. Prefix replacement on a null parent_path leaves stale folder metadata, so the portal thinks the folder is still at root and later no-op moves hit HTTP 400 Folder path is unchanged.

gstack browse upload failed with SAFE_DIRECTORIES is not defined when given /tmp/browse-upload-pending.txt, but the same upload succeeded when the file lived under the repo as .tmp/browse-upload-pending.txt. Prefer repo-relative upload fixtures for this tool.

Stage-1 auto verifier should consume existing pending_command + transition_gate style runtime artifacts first; requiring a new reviewer report in the same slice re-expands scope and leaves the gate without a real producer.

Workflow tiering in this repo should be a derived view over inspect/preflight outputs, not a second policy engine. Current harness already encodes key tier signals such as internal runtime schema classification and planning-artifact preflight handling.
For passive runtime-workflow admission, symptom-style bug prompts should only auto-enter when structured repo context exists; widening on prompt wording alone reintroduces over-admission risk.

When slimming repo control-plane docs, keep machine-readable enforcement in .agent/harness/policy.yaml and reduce AGENTS.md to human-facing ownership, escalation, and quick-gate views; otherwise doc shrink creates rule drift instead of removing it.

When .env leaves RAG_DATA_DIR at /shared-data outside Docker, local debugging can misread runtime config or fail before hitting the real feature path. Falling back to repo data in dev/test and avoiding nested get_settings() leaks makes local verification match the intended IQS wiring.

When backend tests load scripts via importlib.util.spec_from_file_location under Python 3.13, register the module in sys.modules before exec_module; otherwise dataclass processing can crash while resolving string annotations.

In this repo/session, gstack browse can open pages but its upload command fails with `SAFE_DIRECTORIES is not defined`; use Playwright setInputFiles as fallback for upload smoke tests until browse is fixed.

When branch remote API derives RAG_SYSTEM_CONFIG_PATH from RAG_DATA_DIR=/shared-data, a missing shared-data system_config.json makes external fallback use disabled dashscope defaults even if the IQS API key exists; seed system_config.json into the shared data mount before validating online IQS mode.

When creating dual chunks (table_retrieval + table_display) from a single source, three companion mechanisms are mandatory: 1) SourceRef dedupe rule so table_retrieval hit promotes table_display instead of occupying top-k slots; 2) chunk_id identity compatibility since downstream parses ::table:: patterns; 3) citation merge rule so same-source dual chunks produce one citation, not two.

Compatibility layers without per-Phase exit criteria become permanent tech debt. Define removal conditions for each Phase (e.g., Phase 2 completes + 2 weeks no rollback → delete Phase 1 adapter). Without this, compat layer persists indefinitely.

insidence: SourceRef (source identity contract) should be defined in Phase 1 alongside ExtractedDocument, not deferred to Phase 4A. Coordinate consistency (offset remap chain) is the most fragile invariant in the current system. Deferring SourceRef means earlier Phase compat layers may produce misaligned references.

insight: For launch-hardening of RAG, hiding citations is not enough. If grounded internal citations collapse to empty, the response itself must downgrade, and this internal safety gate should stay decoupled from external fallback by default.
In this repo the vendored/home browse binary paths can be absent, but /home/reggie/vscode_folder/MCP/gstack/browse/dist/browse is built and works for open-gstack-browser connect/status/snapshot.

Portal chat answer flicker was caused by page-level conversationEndRef auto-follow scrolling while the public reasoning panel was expanded. Pause sentinel scroll while the latest reasoning summary is expanded, then resume after collapse.

For portal public reasoning, build the scope header from effective citation_details such as requested_document_id_cleared, not only raw ChatRequest document_id; otherwise cross-topic answers can be correct while the thinking panel still claims the stale selected document.

For SOP procedure query regressions, verify both classify_sop_procedure_query and looks_like_procedure_support_query. A query can be high-risk sop_procedure but still miss the work-method support path, causing no_context or weaker answer behavior.

If github.com loads but GitHub assets are slow or fail, check Mihomo domain rules for githubassets/githubusercontent vs a broad DOMAIN-KEYWORD,github selector. Routing github.com/githubassets/githubusercontent DIRECT while leaving githubstatus PROXY restored normal GitHub page performance.

If the VS Code OpenAI/Codex extension logs repeated unexpected EOF or Transport channel closed for api.githubcopilot.com/mcp/, add an explicit githubcopilot.com route before broad github MATCH rules. In this setup routing githubcopilot.com DIRECT restored stable MCP handshakes while chatgpt.com remained on PROXY.
